query:
SELECT w.full_name, DATE_FORMAT(wdf.work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as work_date, CAST(wdf.base_amount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as base_amt, CAST(wdf.deductions AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as deduct, CAST(wdf.net_amount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as net_amt, wdf.worked_minutes, wdf.financial_minutes, wdf.late_minutes, wdf.early_leave_minutes, g.name as group_name, g.daily_wage
FROM worker_daily_finance wdf
JOIN workers w ON wdf.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id
ORDER BY wdf.work_date, wdf.worker_id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT w.full_name, DATE_FORMAT(wdf.work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as work_date, CAST(wdf.base_amount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as base_amt, CAST(wdf.deductions AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as deduct, CAST(wdf.net_amount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as net_amt, wdf.worked_minutes, wdf.financial_minutes, wdf.late_minutes, wdf.early_leave_minutes, g.name as group_name, g.daily_wage
FROM worker_daily_finance wdf
JOIN workers w ON wdf.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id
ORDER BY wdf.work_date, wdf.worker_id;
